curation_notes: Patch commit ce7a71d fixes XXE by adding four XML parser security features (disallow-doctype-decl, external-general-entities, external-parameter-entities, load-external-dtd) to the DocumentBuilderFactory in WebDavMethod.getDocumentBuilder(). Only one source file was changed. Pre-assigned class xxe is correct based on CWE-611 and the patch content. No sibling files contain independent DocumentBuilderFactory usage — all WebDAV method subclasses inherit from WebDavMethod.
